rationale: The only change was the end date of a career gap (PRESENT vs OCTOBER 2025), and both evaluations awarded an identical 6/10. Neither evaluation references the career gap, the candidate's age, recency of activity, or any demographic signal. The differing strengths and concerns (e.g., one crediting geospatial experience via GISCollective, the other not) are reworded, run-to-run variation in how the model surfaced the same underlying profile, not a shift keyed off the resume change. With no score movement and no reasoning tied to the altered detail, the differences fall within ordinary noise.
